title: Mini Christmas Tree with Lights 4 Pack | Desktop Trees with LED Lights | 16cm Festive Decor for Shelves, Holiday Party Ornagment & Christmas Centerpieces for Tables
features: 【🎄 Perfect Festive Sparkle for Shelves & Nooks】 Bring magic to every corner! The small christmas tree comes with LED lights, it can be used for living room, dining room table, fireplace, coffee table, office desk, vanity, counter and other desktop decorations. → Size 4.6*16.2cm ✅
【👍High Quality Material】 Our LED desktop Christmas trees are made of high quality plastic, environmentally friendly and durable, with a solid round base to prevent tipping.

【🏡 Versatile Festive Scenes & The Perfect Gift】 Unleash your creativity! Perfect for crafting DIY winter scenes, dollhouse decorations. It’s the ultimate stocking filler, Secret Santa gift, or a kind token for neighbours, teachers, and colleagues. A guaranteed festive smile!

【🔋 Premium Quality with Replaceable Batteries】 Crafted from high-quality, realistic PVC, these trees are built to last. The LED lights are gentle on the eyes without blinding flicker. Best of all, the batteries are easily replaceable, ensuring your little forest can shine brightly for many Christmases to come.

【🎁 Ideal Stocking Filler & Secret Santa Gift】 Stuck for a thoughtful little gift? These trees are a brilliant, affordable solution! They're a smash hit as: ✔️ Secret Santa presents ✔️ Gifts for neighbours & teachers A truly festive surprise that's ready to gift!
description: 🌟 The Ultimate Festive Advantage🌟 ✔️ 【Complete & Ready to Gift】 → 4 x Mini Trees (approx. 16cm H) + 4 x Exclusive Gift Boxes! → Unbox, switch on, and decorate. It’s that simple! ✔️ 【Cord-Free & Versatile】 → No wires, no plugs, no hassle. Create magical displays on shelves, desks, mantels, or as part of your Christmas village. ✔️ 【Quality That Lasts】 → Realistic PVC material and a stable base prevent tipping. → Gentle, non-flickering LED lights are easy on the eyes, creating a cozy ambiance. → User-replaceable batteries mean years of festive use. 📋 The Details You Need: Contents: 4 x Mini Christmas Trees with built-in LED lights, 4 x Gift Boxes. Batteries: 3 x LR1130 Button Cell batteries INCLUDED with each tree. Dimensions: 4.6cm (L) x 4.6cm (W) x 16.2cm (H).
